input: Standard Deviation (sigma): Measure of dispersion around the mean in original data units. NumPy: np.std(data). Manual from variance: variance ** 0.5. Z-score: (x - mean) / sigma. Square root of variance restores spread to original units for interpretability. Used to compare variability and standardize observations through Z-scores. Population vs sample: ddof=0 vs ddof=1. Related: Variance, Descriptive Statistics, Z-Score, Outlier Detection, Normal Distribution.
